parent._value: Maple World's Unique Fun: Match Cards

0._value: It seems that #p228# in #m010001050# knows a way to find a different kind of fun in Maple World.

1._value: #b#p228##k, whom I met in #m010001050#, said he knows a way to enjoy myself when I get tired of hunting, and asked me to collect #t4031045#s. He said I could easily get them by defeating any of these monsters scattered across Maple World: #b#o3#, #o8#, #o10#, #o12#, #o16#, #o19#, #o23#, #o31#, #o35#, #o37#, #o36#, #o41#, #o43#, #o45#, #o51##k. I should try to gather them when I have the time.

2._value: I brought the requested items to #p228# in #m010001050# and received a #b#t4080100##k! With this, I can play the Match Cards mini-game with other adventurers anywhere! I should remember to ask #p228# if I want to know more about the mini-game.

0._value: Hey, you! You look like you're worn out from all that hunting. My creed is to live a life of enjoyment! How about it? If you bring me just a few items, I'll exchange them for a mini-game item. What do you say?
Good! But you can't just play a mini-game right away. If you want to play the Match Cards mini-game, you'll need a #b#t4080100##k.

1._value: To make a #t4080100#, I need #b#t4031045#s#k. You can get #t4031045#s by taking down monsters scattered across this island, so please bring me 15 of them. I'll be waiting for you right here.

0._value: Hey, sometimes you just need to take a break and look around! If you change your mind, talk to me anytime.

Say! These are definitely 15 #b#t4031045#s#k. That couldn't have been easy—you're amazing! Alright! Time for me to show off my skills! Just wait a moment~ I'll craft your #b#t4080100##k in no time. Heave-ho!

You got your #b#t4080100##k, right? You can use this item anywhere in Maple World to open a mini-game room and have fun with others. If you achieve a high score, something great is sure to happen. I'll be cheering you on from here, so give it your best shot!

1._value: Oh, right. If you ever have any questions about Match Cards, just ask me anytime. I plan on staying here for a while. Now then, go on and try hard to become the ultimate mini-game champion, surpassing even me! Though... that's probably not going to happen. Anyway... I'm busy, so I'll see you later~

0._value: To make #t4080100#, I need #b#t4031045#s#k. You can get #t4031045#s by taking down monsters scattered across this island, so please bring me 15 of them. I'll be waiting for you right here.
